records.rawExplanation:
*2021 (revenue softness — partial coverage):* FY3/2021 forecast revenue ¥62,227M (-3.6% YoY), forecast OP ¥7,634M (-6.5% YoY) per Q3 disclosure. Specific FY3/2021 full-year actuals not surfaced via search snippets — financial numbers: partial. Stock ¥419 (Dec 27) – ¥622 (Sep 17) per Nikkei 10-year history; Sep→Dec ~33% decline. Stock-move catalyst for the Sep peak and Dec trough: not sourced this round — catalyst needs_human. 業績 (revenue, partial) ✕ / 株価 ✕ by year-end.

Sign summary: revenue fell -3.6% YoY; operating profit forecast fell -6.5% per Q3 disclosure; shares fell to ¥419 low (Dec 27); business down, stock fell.

records.rawExplanation:
*2023 (guidance growth — but multi-year derating bottoms):* FY3/2023 guidance per Q3 disclosure (2/2/2023): revenue ¥71,450M (+9.5%), OP ¥10,280M (+12.9%). FY3/2023 full-year actuals not directly recovered — partial. Stock ¥235 (Oct 27) – ¥425 (Feb 1). The Oct 2023 ¥235 print is the multi-year low; from Sep 2021 peak ¥622 to Oct 2023 trough = -62% over ~2 years. **Stock-move catalyst for the Oct 2023 ¥235 trough: no fundamental catalyst sourced in this round; consistent with a multi-year growth-stock derating phase across Japanese IT services 2022–2023, but no specific hard catalyst named — catalyst needs_human.** 業績 (partial) ◎ on guidance / 株価 ✕✕ (multi-year low).

Sign summary: revenue rose +9.5% YoY; operating profit guidance rose +12.9%; stock collapsed to multi-year low; shares fell to ¥235 low (Oct 27); business strong, stock depressed.

records.rawExplanation:
*2024 (split-signal — revenue ◎ / OP ✕ on unprofitable projects):* FY3/2024 actual: revenue ¥76,940M (+3.2% YoY), operating profit −1.3% YoY (small decline). Gross margin 23.5% (-1.2pt), SG&A ratio 10.9% (-0.6pt). Cited cause: 「主力のソリューションデザイン事業は通期で振るわず、利益面では不採算プロジェクトの影響が大きく残り」 — flagship Solution Design segment underperformed; unprofitable projects weighed on operating profit. Stock ¥254 (Apr 19) – ¥406 (Sep 6) per Nikkei — recovery off the 2023 trough. 業績 split-signal (revenue ◎ / profit ✕ — project-margin pressure, not strategic-investment reinvestment). 株価 ◎ relative to 2023 low.

Sign summary: revenue rose +3.2% YoY; operating profit fell -1.3%; operating profit fell on unprofitable Solution Design projects (split signal); shares rallied to ¥406 high (Sep 6); business weak, stock rose.

records.name: Systena

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation:
*2025 (recovery — clean ◎):* FY3/2025 actual: revenue ¥83,621M (+8.7% YoY), operating profit ¥12,067M (+24.2% YoY), recurring profit ¥11,855M (+19.2%), net profit ¥8,480M (+17.3%). Annual dividend ¥12/share. Margin expansion: OP growth ~3x revenue growth. FY3/2026 guidance: revenue ¥89,100M (+6.6%), OP ¥12,700M (+5.2%). Stock ¥312 (Apr 7) – ¥555 (Oct 31) per Nikkei — strong recovery, +78% off the spring low. Stock-move catalyst: FY3/2025 record results announced June 2025 → margin expansion driven by Solution Design segment recovery from FY24 project-margin pressure. 業績 ◎ (revenue + profit acceleration) / 株価 ◎ (recovery).

Cautious side: Solution Design segment shows project-margin volatility (FY24 stumble); competitive IT services pricing pressure; multi-year stock derating 2021–2023 lacks sourced cause and may reflect broader IT-services sector rotation rather than company-specific story.

Sign summary: revenue rose +8.7% YoY; operating profit rose +24.2%; net profit rose +17.3%; record results; first turn to clean profit growth in years; shares rallied to ¥555 high (Oct 31); business strong, stock strong.
